songs.title: Popular Song
feed: “Popular Song” by Mika reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Popular Song” by Mika reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 80 spots to #1.
“Popular Song” by Mika climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 80 spots to #1.
“Popular Song” by Mika is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 500% to 324 points.
“Popular Song” by Mika is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 225 streams units.
“Popular Song” by Mika is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 294,196 total units.
